pr.title: Non-record submission: BigramDim160 + 10% Prune + SWA (1.14767 bpb, 2 seeds)

output.summary: Cuts BigramHash dim to 160 and prunes 10% post-SWA before Int6+zstd compressing the SmearGate/GQA base to stay under 16MB.
techniques: Reduced BigramHash embedding dim to 160 to trim artifact size headroom
Applied 10% post-SWA pruning on non-embedding linear layers prior to quantization
Retained SmearGate/OrthoInit + GQA baseline with Int6+zstd-22 compression
